test_type: Frontend - Intelligent PO Request Stock Screen
summary: Verified all 12 features of the Intelligent PO Request Stock screen (/request/new). Logged in as Master Store (owner@democentral1.com). All features working correctly: 4 stat cards, mode toggle tabs, suggested items table with category grouping, OUT/LOW badges, source availability, pending request warning, order summary, submit button with item count, and source stock cross-validation.

tests.details: Shows 167 Out of Stock (red border), 6 Low Stock (amber border), 1 Adequate, 173 Suggested
'Suggested Reorder' tab with badge showing 173 items, 'Manual Request' tab - both present and switchable
Shows 'SUGGESTED ITEMS (173)' header with columns: checkbox, Item, Category, Your Stock, Source Avail, Order Qty, Suggestion. Auto-detected from stock levels.
Category headers shown (e.g., 'Bulk & Fountain — 5 items', 'Dragees & Bites — 31 items', 'Gift Boxes & Hampers', 'non veg — 7 items')
OUT badges (red) shown for zero-stock items with '0 piece OUT' or '0 kg OUT' format
LOW badges (amber) shown for low-stock items. Found 16 LOW badges in the table.
Shows available quantity at source store (e.g., '46 piece', '117 piece', '45 kg')

tests.feature: Order Qty - Editable with unit labels
tests.details: Order Qty input is editable per row with unit labels (piece, kg) displayed next to input
Shows '2 pending requests with this source' warning with amber background
Switching to Manual Request tab shows original form with item picker dropdown, quantity input, unit field, and 'Add Item' button
Order summary card appears below suggested items showing selected items with quantities
Submit button shows 'Submit Request (173 items)' with correct count
When qty exceeds source availability, warning text 'Source has only X' appears in Suggestion column, and bottom warning banner shows 'exceeds source availability'

console_warnings.message: Encountered two children with the same key (16983, 16981)
console_warnings.impact: No functional impact - warning only. Same catalog item ID appears multiple times in suggested items due to data matching logic.
console_warnings.fix_applied: Changed key from item.id to item._idx for unique keys

action_items: MINOR: React key warning persists - the suggestedItems logic may create duplicate entries when same catalog item matches multiple own stock items. Consider deduplicating by source_inventory_master_id in the suggestedItems useMemo.
critical_code_review_comments: RequestStockForm.jsx is well-structured with clear separation of concerns
Good use of data-testid attributes for testing
Stock health stats calculation is efficient using useMemo
Source cross-validation provides good UX feedback
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/central-inventory/RequestStockForm.jsx - Added React import and changed Fragment key to use item._idx
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Intelligent PO Request Stock screen fully verified. All 12 features working: 4 stat cards (167 out, 6 low, 1 adequate, 173 suggested), mode toggle tabs with badge, suggested items table with category grouping, OUT/LOW badges, source availability column, editable order qty with units, pending requests warning (2 pending), manual request form, order summary, submit button with count, source cross-validation warnings. Minor React key warning in console (duplicate IDs 16983, 16981) - no functional impact.
